name: writing-polish
description: Professional Chinese writing skill based on 《怎样写作》(任仲然) methodology with 230+ anti-AI-taste rules. v5.0 model-decoupled three-layer hybrid: L1 hard-gate (scan-ai-taste.sh, zero model), L2 LLM Judge executed by Claude Code main agent (no external API, no BYOM env), L3 multi-agent review via clean-context subagents (R1 parallel views + R2 fresh-eye + Pre-modification advisory). Mirrors Anthropic doc-coauthoring SKILL paradigm (pure markdown instructions, 0 API calls). Inherits v4.3 context-aware whitelists, dynamic density thresholds, consulting-report constraints (§1.8), 11 real-world anchors. 基于专业方法论的中文写作辅助与审稿润色，v5.0 模型解耦三层 hybrid：L1 硬 Gate 脚本 + L2 主对话 LLM Judge（零外部 API） + L3 多智能体审校（clean-context subagent）。对标 Anthropic 官方 doc-coauthoring 范式，纯 markdown instructions、0 行 API 调用。
